schemes.benefit_en: Free coaching for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, Banking) for Jharkhand youth
schemes.benefit_hi: UPSC, SSC, बैंकिंग परीक्षाओं की मुफ्त कोचिंग
schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand youth aged 18-35 from poor families

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 40,000 total support for girl child education in 6 installments
3-room pucca house with Rs 2 lakh grant for homeless Jharkhand families
schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर परिवारों को ₹2 लाख में 3 कमरों का पक्का घर
schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand homeless families not covered under PMAY

schemes.benefit_en: 50-90% subsidy on cows, goats, poultry for tribal & BPL families
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय/BPL परिवारों को गाय, बकरी, मुर्गी पर 50-90% सब्सिडी
